full_text:
Cao Pi (Zihuan) 曹丕 (子桓)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Pi (曹丕), styledZihuan (子桓), was born in Qiao County, Pei County (Presently Bozhou city in Anhui Province). Cao Cao’s second son and successor. Deposed Emperor Xian. First Wei Emperor. Cao Pi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Pi lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
